/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/bit_flip_corruption_test.dir/bit_flip_corruption_test.cc.o -o bit_flip_corruption_test  ../libmwal.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a -lzstd ../lib/libgtest.a
